login.title: Admin Login
login.desc: Enter the ADMIN_SECRET defined in your environment variables.

confirm.all: Reset everything: users + restaurants + reservations. Continue?
confirm.restaurants: Reset all restaurants? This action cannot be undone!
confirm.users: Reset all users? Note: this will also delete restaurant owners.

tables.approved_empty: No restaurants have been approved yet.
tables.pending_empty: No pending restaurants at the moment.

confirm.reset_restaurants: Reset all restaurants? This action cannot be undone!
confirm.head: Confirm action · Admin
confirm.title: Confirm action

tools.title: Admin Tools
tools.desc: Use the links below to run reset operations (confirmation required).

users.title: User Management
users.add_and_reload: Add the export and reload the page.
users.confirm_delete: Deleting a user will also delete all their restaurants and reservations. Continue?

delete.head: Removed from site · Admin
delete.msg_tail: was removed from the system, including its reservations.
delete.title: Removed from site

ui.login_help: Use the console for approvals, users, and maintenance operations.
ui.dashboard_intro: Central place for restaurant approvals, homepage featuring, and maintenance tasks.
ui.restaurant_toolbar_help: Review restaurants quickly, search by owner, city, or address, and perform actions without leaving the page.
ui.pending_help: Restaurants waiting for approval are shown here.
ui.approved_help: Approved restaurants stay live and can be featured on the homepage.
ui.tools_intro: Use these tools carefully. Every destructive action should be confirmed and double-checked.
ui.tools_help: Open a confirmation page before executing any reset.
ui.reset_warning: Resets are immediate and affect production-like data in this environment.
ui.confirm_help: This action cannot be undone once executed.
ui.users_intro: Search by name, email, role, or restaurant and manage accounts with fewer clicks.
ui.user_toolbar_help: Filter by active status or search by user and restaurant name.
